back_translation: Therefore, while the promise of entering the rest of God still remains, let us fear, lest there be anyone among you who appears to have fallen short
Because we also have received the gospel just like them, but the words that they heard were not profitable to them, because they did not blend with the faith of those who heard

Because we who have believed enter the rest, just as God has said, ‘So I swore in the wrath of mine, “They shall not enter the rest of mine at all”,’ even though all the works have been completed since the founding of the world
Because somewhere God speaks about the seventh day in this manner, ‘And on the seventh day, God rested from all His works’
And in that passage God says again, ‘They shall not enter the rest of mine at all’
Therefore, since it still remains for some to enter that rest, and since those who received the gospel before did not enter because of disobedience
God thus designated another day, namely ‘Today,’ speaking through David a long time later, as has already been said, ‘Today, if you all hear the voice of His, do not make the hearts of yours hard’
Because if Joshua had given them rest, then God would not have spoken about another day later
Therefore, there still remains a Sabbath rest for the people of God
Because the one who enters the rest of God has rested from his own work, just as God Himself rested from His own work
Therefore, let us strive earnestly to enter that rest, lest anyone fall by the same pattern of disobedience

Because the word of God is alive and has power, sharper than any double-edged sword, and pierces through to the dividing of soul and spirit, joints and the marrow in bones, and judges the thoughts and intentions of the heart
And there is no created thing that is hidden from the face of God, but all things are naked and exposed to the eyes of His, the One to whom we must give account
Therefore, since we have a great high priest, the One who has passed through all the heavens, namely Jesus the Son of God, let us hold fast to the confession of ours
Because we do not have a high priest who is not able to sympathize with the weaknesses of ours, but we have the One who was tested in all things just like us, but without sin
Therefore, let us come with boldness to the throne of grace, in order that we will receive mercy and find grace to help us in the time of need
